overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 exploring the interior of the 'Blue Moon' diner, a cyberpunk-style bar with vibrant neon signage and red leather booths. The player character walks through the establishment, interacts with an NPC named Panam, then transitions through a loading corridor into 'The Atlantis' bar with cool blue industrial lighting.

large circular purple neon sign with 'Blue Moon' text

segments.scene_description: The segment opens inside the Blue Moon diner, a cyberpunk bar illuminated by vibrant purple and green neon signs. The camera moves past the wooden bar counter with illuminated beer taps and red leather stools, while a bartender works in the background. The space features retro-futuristic decor with posters and an arcade machine visible in the corner.

events.description: dialogue UI appears as ego approaches Panam sitting in the booth

agents.ego_description: approaching Panam's table to initiate conversation, dialogue options visible on screen

notable_agents.action: Panam sitting in the booth wearing a red cap, engaging in dialogue with ego

entered.detail: large windows showing nighttime cityscape with neon lights outside
cyan neon directional arrow on the wall
wall covered with cyberpunk-style posters and advertisements

segments.scene_description: The camera moves toward the window seating area where Panam sits in a red booth. A dialogue interface appears offering conversation choices. The scene shows the city lights visible through large windows and walls decorated with cyberpunk posters, while other patrons sit at the counter in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: rear dining area with Sunset sign

agents.ego_description: circulating around the diner past window seating and toward the back area

notable_agents.action: patron sitting at window counter looking outside

entered.detail: large American flag hanging on the back wall
vertical neon sign reading 'SUNSET' in white letters
green neon sign with chinese characters and smiley face

segments.scene_description: The camera continues circulating through the diner, passing patrons seated at window booths looking out at the night city. The scene reveals the back area featuring an American flag and a 'SUNSET' neon sign, then curves back toward the bar area with the Blue Moon neon sign visible again.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial loading corridor transitioning to new bar

events.description: screen fades to black and loads new area 'The Atlantis'
emerges from dark corridor into blue-lit industrial bar interior

agents.ego_description: walking through the dark transition corridor and entering The Atlantis bar

entered.detail: large illuminated sign reading 'The Atlantis' in industrial corridor
narrow dimly lit concrete hallway connecting the two locations
long bar counter illuminated by cool blue industrial lighting
exposed metal scaffolding and pipes on ceiling

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions through a dark loading corridor featuring 'The Atlantis' signage, then emerges into a new bar area with stark blue industrial lighting and exposed metal beams. The warm neon atmosphere of Blue Moon gives way to this cooler, more utilitarian space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the vibrant, neon-lit interior of the Blue Moon diner that eventually transitions into the stark, industrial atmosphere of The Atlantis bar. It begins by gliding past a wooden bar counter with illuminated beer taps and red leather stools, moving through a retro-futuristic space filled with purple and green neon signs. As the camera approaches the window seating, it pauses briefly at a red booth where Panam sits against a backdrop of city lights and cyberpunk posters before circulating further back toward an American flag and a glowing Sunset sign. The scene then shifts away from the warm neon glow, passing through a dark loading corridor marked with signage before finally emerging into a cool, utilitarian environment defined by blue industrial lighting and exposed metal beams.
